title: IT System Support Engineer
description:
Primary Responsibility

 A proactive and detail-oriented IT Support Assistant / Executive responsible for delivering reliable Level 1 and Level 2 IT support to office and retail users. The role ensures smooth day-to-day IT operations across multiple locations by supporting end users, maintaining IT infrastructure, and supporting business systems including ERP, POS, and eCommerce platforms. Strong troubleshooting skills, professionalism, and a service-oriented mindset are essential to ensure business continuity and productivity. 

Areas of Responsibility

1. IT Support & End-User Services

  • Provide Level 1 and Level 2 IT support for office and retail users (onsite and remote).

  • Troubleshoot hardware, software, application, POS, and network-related issues.

  • Manage IT helpdesk tickets, prioritize incidents, and ensure timely resolution.

  • Support new user onboarding and offboarding including system access, email setup, and device configuration.

  • Provide basic user training and IT guidance to improve system adaptation.

2. POS Systems & Retail Technology Support

  • Provide day-to-day support for POS systems across retail stores.

  • Troubleshoot POS hardware such as terminals, scanners, receipt printers, and payment devices.

  • Support POS software issues including transactions, item setup, pricing, and store connectivity.

  • Coordinate with vendors and internal teams to resolve POS outages and critical store incidents.

  • Assist with POS rollout, upgrades, patches, and store opening or relocation activities.

3. Systems, Infrastructure & Security

  • Assist in managing servers, networks, and IT infrastructure.

  • Monitor system performance, backups, and recovery processes.

  • Support IT security policies, endpoint protection, and access controls.

  • Assist with OS updates, software patching, and hardware refresh cycles.

  • Identify and escalate potential system or security risks.

4. IT Operations & Administration

  • Coordinate with vendors for IT services, procurement, and maintenance.

  • Maintain IT inventory, asset registers, and license tracking.

  • Prepare and maintain IT documentation, SOPs, and user guides.

  • Support store setups, relocations, and infrastructure deployment.

5. Business Systems & Applications

  • Provide frontline support for ERP, POS, and eCommerce platforms.

  • Assist users with system usage, troubleshooting, and basic training.

  • Work closely with operations and finance teams to support business processes.

  • Escalate application issues with clear documentation and impact analysis.

What We’re Looking For

  • Experience providing IT support to end users in office or retail environments.

  • Basic knowledge of hardware, operating systems, applications, and networking.

  • Experience supporting POS systems is highly preferred.

  • Good communication, documentation, and problem-solving skills.

  • Willingness to learn new technologies and support multi-site operations.

postedCompany.description:
GILLCAPITAL was established in 2007 by seasoned entrepreneur J.S. Gill. It is a Singapore-based company which operates a group of brands and businesses with world-class credentials.


Building on more than three decades of experience in the Southeast Asian and Middle Eastern markets, Gill Capital cherry-picks the best of global brands and creates innovative retail concepts to give its customers exactly what they want. Sometimes, before they even know they want it.

What the World Wants Next - this springs to mind when describing the ever-expanding constellation of Gill Capital’s stellar brands. From award-winning home-grown concept Candylicious, to fast fashion phenomena H&M, its brands represent the very best of their categories.

Encompassing nine companies and spanning three countries, Gill Capital is a powerhouse of almost clairvoyant creativity, innovation and business acumen Industry observers wonder out loud – what will they do next?
